name: Regsvcs-Regasm Detected
description: Detection of `Regsvcs` and `Regasm` abusing the DLL. `Regsvcs` and `Regasm` are legitimate Microsoft utilities that can be used by attackers to execute arbitrary code or bypass application whitelisting policies. This detection is based on the behavioral analysis of these utilities loading a suspicious DLL from an unusual location.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the use of `{process_name}` to load the DLL `{dll_path}` at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The command line detected was `{command_line}`. Analyze the user (`{user_name}`) who executed the command and the origin of the DLL. Determine if this is a legitimate use of the utility or a malicious attempt to execute code. Provide a summary of the findings and recommend immediate containment and remediation steps.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the utility used (e.g., regsvcs.exe or regasm.exe).

parameters.name: dll_path
parameters.description: The path to the DLL that was loaded.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the activity was detected.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the process.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
